title: stuckenia subretusa
intro: Stuckenia subretusa, also known as hooked water-plantain or lesser water-plantain, is a species of aquatic plant in the family Potamogetonaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues such as dysentery and diarrhea. The plant's roots and rhizomes contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it beneficial for various health conditions, including fever reduction and wound healing. Stuckenia subretusa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used in herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments.
